name: cakeup-backend
description: Backend NestJS com JWT, Redis e Postgres

scripts.migration:run: ts-node --transpile-only -r tsconfig-paths/register -e "require('./src/data-source').AppDataSource.initialize().then(ds => ds.runMigrations()).then(() => process.exit(0)).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.migration:revert: ts-node --transpile-only -r tsconfig-paths/register -e "require('./src/data-source').AppDataSource.initialize().then(ds => ds.undoLastMigration()).then(() => process.exit(0)).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.migration:show: ts-node --transpile-only -r tsconfig-paths/register -e "require('./src/data-source').AppDataSource.initialize().then(ds => ds.showMigrations()).then(() => process.exit(0)).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
